---
title: "Expected fledglings"
---



```{r}
#| label: setup-final-summaries
#| include: false

# Load libraries needed for this chapter
pacman::p_load(here, brms, tidyverse)
```




```{r}
fit_ord <- readRDS(here::here("..","Rdata", "female_fit_Q17.rds"))
```







```{r}
range(fit_ord$data$TIME)
```


```{r}
time_early <- -8.643948
time_late  <-  11.356052
```



```{r}
newdat <- tibble(
  ZX5MISMATCH = c(0, 0),
  TIME        = c(time_early, time_late),
  AGE         = c(0, 0),
  AFR         = c(0, 0),
  LONGEVITY   = c(0, 0)
)
```



```{r}
# ---- 3) Posterior predicted category probabilities ----
# re_formula = NA excludes random effects (population-level prediction)
# Result dimensions are typically: draws x newdata_rows x categories
ep <- posterior_epred(fit_ord, newdata = newdat, re_formula = NA)

# Check dimensions (optional)
print(dim(ep))
# expected: [n_draws, 2, 4]

# ---- 4) Convert category probabilities to expected fledglings ----


fled_vals <- c(0, 1, 2, 3)

# Expected fledglings per draw for each row in newdata
# early = row 1, late = row 2
E_early <- ep[, 1, ] %*% fled_vals
E_late  <- ep[, 2, ] %*% fled_vals

# Convert matrices to numeric vectors
E_early <- as.numeric(E_early)
E_late  <- as.numeric(E_late)

# ---- 5) Percent change across study period ----
pct_change <- 100 * (E_late - E_early) / E_early

# ---- 6) Summarize posterior distribution ----
summary_tbl <- tibble(
  quantity = c("Expected fledglings (early)", "Expected fledglings (late)", "Percent change"),
  median   = c(median(E_early), median(E_late), median(pct_change)),
  l95      = c(quantile(E_early, 0.025), quantile(E_late, 0.025), quantile(pct_change, 0.025)),
  u95      = c(quantile(E_early, 0.975), quantile(E_late, 0.975), quantile(pct_change, 0.975))
)

print(summary_tbl)
```
